title: CORGI & WOOLLY - Little Horizon -
description:
Against the horizon stretching across the edge of the screen, time passes quietly for the corgi and the sheep.CORGI & WOOLLY - Little Horizon - is a tiny world that doesn’t get in the way of your work. At the edge of your desktop, a Corgi walks and stops, and before you know it, sheep begin to gather little by little. They move on even if you don’t touch them, and the world keeps going even when you’re not looking.

While you’re working or studying, your Corgi is hard at work herding sheep in the corner of your desktop. Every time you type on the keyboard or move the mouse, that energy becomes sustenance for the flock.

CORGI & WOOLLY - Little Horizon - takes place in the same world and at the same time as the game currently in development, CORGI & WOOLLY.

Some avatar items require DLC to unlock.

Videos & StreamingGameplay videos and livestreams are welcome.
We would appreciate it if you could include the game title and a link to the Steam Store page in your video description, stream title, or similar.
description_short: A little pasture in the corner of your desktop. A lively sheepdog herds sheep and plays beside you while you work or study. Your typing and mouse clicks help grow the flock and bring life to the pasture. A cozy desktop companion game that quietly keeps you company throughout the day.

upsells.name: CORGI & WOOLLY - Little Horizon - Supporter Pack
